title: CO-Bench
description: Evaluate the configured model on CO-Bench by generating solve(**kwargs) implementations and scoring them with the official evaluator.
baseline_summary: Checked-in CO-Bench wrapper that selects the task subset and the prompting policy used to generate per-task Python code.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. This file is the CO-Bench wrapper. Preserve def build_run_config(), SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_user_prompt(problem_description), and RUN_CONFIG = build_run_config(). The benchmark evaluates the wrapper by using it to prompt the model for each CO-Bench task.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher average normalized CO-Bench test score is better.
